[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10000000 1
1 11111010 6
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 10000110 3
5 00110001 3
6 01011010 4
7 10101010 4

01 10 00000000 a match 2 3
12 21 00010000 1
23 32 00001010 2
34 43 10100000 2
45 54 00000001 1
56 65 00000000 a match 2 3
67 76 10000000 1 match 0
70 07 10000010 2

02 20 00000010 1
13 31 00100000 1
24 42 00010000 1
35 53 00001010 2
46 64 10000000 1 match 0
57 75 00001010 2
60 06 10000000 1 match 0
71 17 00110000 2

03 30 10000010 2
14 41 00110001 3 match 5
25 52 00001010 2
36 63 10000000 1 match 0
47 74 10110000 3
50 05 00000010 1
61 16 00000000 a match 2 3
72 27 01011010 4 match 6

04 40 10000100 2
15 51 00000001 1
26 62 00000000 a match 2 3
37 73 10101010 4 match 7
